subcodes.first_line: We desire to make mention of him whom We have chosen, and impart unto him that which the Sinatic Tree hath spoken within My breast - verily, there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اردنا ان نذکر من ارادنا و نلقی الیه ما نطق به السدره فی صدری انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for teaching, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
